SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver

Class RMIVirtualServer

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
All Implemented Interfaces:
VirtualServer, EventListener
public class RMIVirtualServer extends Object implements VirtualServer
This class is the RMI implementation of the VirtualServer interface.

  • Constructor Details

    • RMIVirtualServer

      public RMIVirtualServer(RMIServerStub RMIS, RMIClientSkeleton clientSkeleton)
      The constructor of the class.
      Parameters:
      RMIS - The RMIServerStub object.
      clientSkeleton - The RMIClientSkeleton object.

  • Method Details

    • createLobby

      public void createLobby(String nick, int numPlayers)
      This method is used to create a new lobby. The client sends a request to the server to create a new lobby. The server will create a new game and add the client to the lobby. The server will send a response to the client with the hash code of the lobby. The client will use the hash code to join the lobby.
      Specified by:
      createLobby in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      nick - The nickname of the client.
      numPlayers - The number of players in the lobby.

    • askLobbies

      public void askLobbies()
      This method is used to ask the server for the list of available lobbies. The server will send a response to the client with the list of available lobbies.
      Specified by:
      askLobbies in interface VirtualServer

    • joinLobby

      public void joinLobby(int hash, String nick)
      This method is used to join a lobby. The client sends a request to the server to join a lobby. The server will add the client to the lobby. The server will send a response to the client with the list of players in the lobby.
      Specified by:
      joinLobby in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      hash - The hash code of the lobby.
      nick - The nickname of the client.

    • placeStartCard

      public void placeStartCard(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
      This method is used to place the start card. The client sends a request to the server to place the start card. The server will place the start card on the board. The server will send a response to the client with the updated board.
      Specified by:
      placeStartCard in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      cardId - The hash code of the card.
      side - The side of the card.
      pos - The position of the card.

    • chooseToken

      public void chooseToken(String player, Token token)
      This method is used to make the player choose the token. The client sends a request to the server to make the player choose the token. The server will send a response to the client with the updated board.
      Specified by:
      chooseToken in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      token - The token chosen by the player.

    • chooseObjective

      public void chooseObjective(String player, int cardId)
      This method is used to make the player choose the objective. The client sends a request to the server to make the player choose the objective. The server will send a response to the client with the updated board.
      Specified by:
      chooseObjective in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      cardId - The hash code of the card.

    • placeCard

      public void placeCard(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
      This method is used to make the player place a card. The client sends a request to the server to make the player place a card. The server will send a response to the client with the updated board.
      Specified by:
      placeCard in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      cardId - The hash code of the card.
      side - The side of the card.
      pos - The position of the card.

    • drawCardFromDeck

      public void drawCardFromDeck(String player, String deck)
      This method is used to make the player draw a card from the deck. The client sends a request to the server to make the player draw a card from the deck. The server will send a response to the client with the updated board.
      Specified by:
      drawCardFromDeck in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      deck - The deck from which the player will draw the card.

    • drawCardFromAvailable

      public void drawCardFromAvailable(String player, int cardId)
      This method is used to make the player draw a card from the available cards. The client sends a request to the server to make the player draw a card from the available cards. The server will send a response to the client with the updated board.
      Specified by:
      drawCardFromAvailable in interface VirtualServer
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      cardId - The hash code of the card.
